mapper.select: SELECT fl.family_id, pl.line_id, pl.permission_id, p.permission_title, pl.is_enable, pl.created_at FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON pl.permission_id = p.permission_id JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON pl.line_id = fl.line_id WHERE pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT fl.family_id, pl.line_id, pl.permission_id, p.permission_title, pl.is_enable, pl.created_at FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON pl.permission_id = p.permission_id JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON pl.line_id = fl.line_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} AND pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PERMISSION_LINE (line_id, permission_id, is_enable, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{lineId}, #{permissionId}, #{isEnable}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_enable = #{isEnable}, updated_at = NOW()
